About Me

Sherwin Amorganda

Systems Architect & Automation Specialist based in Metro Manila, Philippines. I design and maintain the full digital infrastructure for a US-based recruitment and staffing agency.

My daily work spans CRM administration, workflow automation, database architecture, and AI integration. I build end-to-end pipelines using GoHighLevel, Make, Zapier, Supabase, and Softr that turn manual, error-prone processes into reliable automated systems.

Licensed Civil Engineer by training, which gives me the structured problem-solving and analytical rigor that carries over into systems work. I document everything I build, test workflows end-to-end before deployment, and proactively flag blockers before they become problems.

Selected Work

Projects & Systems

Real production systems I've built and currently maintain. Each project represents live infrastructure handling daily operations.

Recruitment Infrastructure
Multi-Workflow Outreach System

The backbone of the recruitment operation. Multiple interconnected GoHighLevel workflows handling the full candidate pipeline: lead entry with conditional routing, chatbot automation for initial engagement, and a large-scale orchestration workflow managing SMS/email sequences, appointment scheduling, agent assignment, A2P compliance, and calendar overflow routing.

GoHighLevel Make Zapier Gmail Webhooks
Lead RoutingSMS/Email SequencesA2P Compliance1,500+ CandidatesBulk Processing
Operations Platform
Recruiting App (Airtable to Supabase Migration)

A full-stack recruiting application that evolved through two major versions. Originally built on Airtable with an initial 40k leads pool. As the operation scaled, I migrated the entire infrastructure to Supabase (PostgreSQL) for better query performance and lower costs, now handling 100k+ leads and counting. The current version serves 200+ active users through Softr portals with role-based views, real-time funnel summaries, agent performance tracking, and automated pipeline metrics.

Airtable Supabase PostgreSQL Softr Make Zapier

Make scenarios powering the data sync between Supabase, GoHighLevel, and notification systems.

200+ Active Users134 CampaignsReal-time Dashboards80% Less Manual EntryFull Data Migration
Web Development
Client Websites & Landing Pages

WordPress/Elementor websites and landing pages built for recruitment and staffing clients. Each site is designed for lead capture and conversion, with clean layouts, clear CTAs, and integration points for CRM pipelines and tracking.
